companies.name: ON SEMICONDUCTOR CORP
companies.rationale: ON Semiconductor is a significant player in the semiconductor sector, providing a broad range of products used in diverse applications from automotive to industrial sectors.

companies.name: INTEL CORP
companies.rationale: Intel is one of the largest and most influential companies in the semiconductor industry worldwide, focusing on microprocessors and other semiconductor products.

companies.name: ADVANCED MICRO DEVICES INC
companies.rationale: Advanced Micro Devices is a major competitor in the semiconductor market, known for its high-performance computing and graphics technology.

companies.name: NVIDIA CORP
companies.rationale: NVIDIA specializes in graphics processing units (GPUs) and is a key player in the domains of AI, gaming, and autonomous vehicles among semiconductors.

companies.name: Broadcom Inc.
companies.rationale: Broadcom Inc. is a major designer, developer, and global supplier of a broad range of semiconductor and infrastructure software solutions.

overall_rationale: To gain insights into the semiconductor industry, this scope includes major publicly traded companies known for significant contributions to semiconductor technology. The selected form types are comprehensive, covering annual, quarterly, and significant event reports over the last three years. This will provide a detailed view of financial performance, strategies, and key events impacting the sector.
